mapper.sql: aarh.abnromal_attendance_record_id, aarh.employee_id, aarh.date, aarh.last_paragraph_end_time, aarh.first_time_from, aarh.first_time_to, aarh.extend1_time_flag, aarh.second_time_from, aarh.second_time_to, aarh.extend2_time_flag, aarh.third_time_from, aarh.third_time_to, aarh.extend3_time_flag, aarh.next_period_start_time, aarh.rest_flag, aarh.no_scheduling, aarh.rest_day_clock, aarh.all_day_no_clock, aarh.office_time_clock, aarh.no_clock_in, aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time, aarh.no_clock_after_work, aarh.alt_first_time_from, aarh.alt_first_time_to, aarh.alt_extend1_time_flag, aarh.alt_second_time_from, aarh.alt_second_time_to, aarh.alt_extend2_time_flag, aarh.alt_third_time_from, aarh.alt_third_time_to, aarh.alt_extend3_time_flag, aarh.alt_rest_day_flag, aarh.attribute1, aarh.attribute2, aarh.attribute3, aarh.attribute4, aarh.attribute5, aarh.id, aarh.dispose_flag, aarh.result, aarh.update_by, aarh.create_by, aarh.update_time, aarh.create_time

${tAlias}.abnromal_attendance_record_id as ${tAlias}_abnromal_attendance_record_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.last_paragraph_end_time as ${tAlias}_last_paragraph_end_time, ${tAlias}.first_time_from as ${tAlias}_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.first_time_to as ${tAlias}_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.second_time_from as ${tAlias}_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.second_time_to as ${tAlias}_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.third_time_from as ${tAlias}_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.third_time_to as ${tAlias}_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.next_period_start_time as ${tAlias}_next_period_start_time, ${tAlias}.rest_flag as ${tAlias}_rest_flag, ${tAlias}.no_scheduling as ${tAlias}_no_scheduling, ${tAlias}.rest_day_clock as ${tAlias}_rest_day_clock, ${tAlias}.all_day_no_clock as ${tAlias}_all_day_no_clock, ${tAlias}.office_time_clock as ${tAlias}_office_time_clock, ${tAlias}.no_clock_in as ${tAlias}_no_clock_in, ${tAlias}.abnormal_clock_in_time as ${tAlias}_abnormal_clock_in_time, ${tAlias}.no_clock_after_work as ${tAlias}_no_clock_after_work, ${tAlias}.alt_first_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_first_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_second_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_second_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_third_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_third_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_rest_day_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_rest_day_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.dispose_flag as ${tAlias}_dispose_flag, ${tAlias}.result as ${tAlias}_result, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time

select aarh.abnromal_attendance_record_id, aarh.employee_id, aarh.date, aarh.last_paragraph_end_time, aarh.next_period_start_time, aarh.rest_flag, aarh.no_scheduling, aarh.rest_day_clock, aarh.all_day_no_clock, aarh.office_time_clock, aarh.no_clock_in, aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time, aarh.no_clock_after_work, aarh.alt_first_time_from, aarh.alt_first_time_to, aarh.alt_extend1_time_flag, aarh.alt_second_time_from, aarh.alt_second_time_to, aarh.alt_extend2_time_flag, aarh.alt_third_time_from, aarh.alt_third_time_to, aarh.alt_extend3_time_flag, aarh.alt_rest_day_flag, aarh.attribute1, aarh.attribute2, aarh.attribute3, aarh.attribute4, aarh.attribute5, aarh.id, aarh.dispose_flag, aarh.result, pe.work_card as pe_work_card, pe.NAME as pe_name, fds.dept as pe_dept_name, fds.department as pe_department, fds.team as pe_team, fj.job_name as jobName FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh JOIN pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs ON aarh.employee_id = pejs.employee_id AND aarh.date = pejs.date JOIN pm_employee pe ON aarh.employee_id = pe.id and pe.id = pejs.employee_id AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_dept_snapshot fds on pejs.dept_id = fds.dept_id and pejs.date = fds.date join fnd_job fj on fj.id = pejs.job_id where 1 = 1

if.test: criteria.disposeFlag != null and criteria.disposeFlag != 'not' and criteria.disposeFlag != 'notPass'

if.if: and ( aarh.no_scheduling = 1 or aarh.rest_day_clock = 1 or aarh.all_day_no_clock = 1 or aarh.office_time_clock = 1 or aarh.no_clock_in = 1 or aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time = 1 or aarh.no_clock_after_work = 1 )
and ( aarh.no_scheduling & aarh.rest_day_clock & aarh.all_day_no_clock & aarh.office_time_clock & aarh.no_clock_in & aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time & aarh.no_clock_after_work ) = 0

mapper.insert: insert into ac_attendance_record_history (abnromal_attendance_record_id, employee_id, date, last_paragraph_end_time, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, next_period_start_time, rest_flag, no_scheduling, rest_day_clock, all_day_no_clock, office_time_clock, no_clock_in, abnormal_clock_in_time, no_clock_after_work, alt_first_time_from, alt_first_time_to, alt_extend1_time_flag, alt_second_time_from, alt_second_time_to, alt_extend2_time_flag, alt_third_time_from, alt_third_time_to, alt_extend3_time_flag, alt_rest_day_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, dispose_flag, result, update_by, create_by, update_time, create_time) values (#{abnromalAttendanceRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lastParagraphEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{nextPeriodStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{restFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noScheduling,jdbcType=BIT}, #{restDayClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{allDayNoClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{officeTimeClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noClockIn,jdbcType=BIT}, #{abnormalClockInTime,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noClockAfterWork,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altFirstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altFirstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altSecondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altSecondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altThirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altThirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altRestDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_attendance_record_history set abnromal_attendance_record_id = #{abnromalAttendanceRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, last_paragraph_end_time = #{lastParagraphEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, first_time_from = #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, first_time_to = #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend1_time_flag = #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, second_time_from = #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, second_time_to = #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend2_time_flag = #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, third_time_from = #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, third_time_to = #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend3_time_flag = #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, next_period_start_time = #{nextPeriodStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, rest_flag = #{restFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, no_scheduling = #{noScheduling,jdbcType=BIT}, rest_day_clock = #{restDayClock,jdbcType=BIT}, all_day_no_clock = #{allDayNoClock,jdbcType=BIT}, office_time_clock = #{officeTimeClock,jdbcType=BIT}, no_clock_in = #{noClockIn,jdbcType=BIT}, abnormal_clock_in_time = #{abnormalClockInTime,jdbcType=BIT}, no_clock_after_work = #{noClockAfterWork,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_first_time_from = #{altFirstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_first_time_to = #{altFirstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend1_time_flag = #{altExtend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_second_time_from = #{altSecondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_second_time_to = #{altSecondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend2_time_flag = #{altExtend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_third_time_from = #{altThirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_third_time_to = #{altThirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend3_time_flag = #{altExtend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_rest_day_flag = #{altRestDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dispose_flag = #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result = #{result,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej WHERE pej.id = temp.pej_id AND pej.job_id != isnull(( SELECT fd.admin_job_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.id = temp.dept_id ), -1 ))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej WHERE pej.id = temp.pej_id AND pej.job_id = isnull(( SELECT fd.admin_job_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.id = temp.dept_id ), -1 ))
and temp.date between #{criteria.beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} AND #{criteria.endDate, jdbcType = DATE}

choose.when: and ((temp.aacr_code_status = 'leaderRepulse' and isnull(temp.aacr_commit_flag,0) = 0) or (temp.aacr_code_status = 'leaderRepulseToPerson' and isnull(temp.aacr_commit_flag,0) = 0))

mapper.update:
update ac_abnormal_clock_record set commit_flag = 1, check_result = case when temp.aacr_code_status <> 'leader' then temp.aacr_dispose_result else temp.aacr_check_result end, check_describes = case when temp.aacr_code_status <> 'leader' then temp.aacr_dispose_describes else temp.aacr_check_describes end, attribute1 = case when temp.aacr_code_status <> 'leader' then '资料员于复核中提交' else null end, code_status = 'leader' from (
) temp join ac_abnormal_clock_record acr on temp.aacr_id = acr.id
mapper.sql:
union
and aarh.employee_id = #{criteria.personEmployeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
AND (aacr.code_status = 'documentor' or aacr.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'person' )
AND ( (isnull(aacr.commit_flag, 0) = 0 and (aacr.code_status = 'documentor' or aacr.code_status = 'leader' or aacr.code_status = 'person')) or (isnull(aacr.commit_flag, 0) = 0 and (aacr.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'leaderRepulseToPerson')))
and (aacr.code_status = 'person' or aacr.code_status = 'leaderRepulse')
AND (aacr.code_status = 'documentor' or aacr.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aacr.code_status = 'person' or aacr.code_status = 'leader' ) and isnull(aacr.commit_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.select:
select DISTINCT fu.email, convert(varchar(4), year(aarh.date)) + '年' + convert(varchar(2), month(aarh.date)) + '月' as year_and_month from
fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 join ac_attendance_record_history aarh on aarh.employee_id = fu.employee_id where (aarh.no_scheduling = 1 OR aarh.all_day_no_clock = 1 OR aarh.office_time_clock = 1 OR aarh.no_clock_in = 1 OR aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time = 1 OR aarh.no_clock_after_work = 1) and isnull(fu.email, '@in-sunten.com') <> '@in-sunten.com' and fu.email <> '' and aarh.abnromal_attendance_record_id = (select top (1) case when aaar.execution_status = 'SUCCESS' then aaar.id else -aaar.id end from ac_abnormal_attendance_record aaar order by aaar.id desc )
mapper.sql: select CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej JOIN fnd_dept fd ON pej.job_id = fd.admin_job_id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 AND pej.employee_id = aarh.employee_id ) then 1 else 0 end as record_is_charge_flag, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej JOIN fnd_dept fd ON pej.job_id = fd.admin_job_id AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.enabled_flag = 1 AND fd.deleted_flag = 0 AND pej.employee_id = aarh.employee_id ) then 1 else 0 end as record_plus_charge_flag, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdt where fds.ext_dept_id = fdt.id) AS pe_dept_name, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdt where fds.ext_department_id = fdt.id) AS pe_department, (select dept_name from fnd_dept fdt where fds.ext_team_id = fdt.id) AS pe_team, aarh.abnromal_attendance_record_id, aarh.employee_id, aarh.date, aarh.last_paragraph_end_time, aarh.next_period_start_time, aarh.rest_flag, aarh.no_scheduling, aarh.rest_day_clock, aarh.all_day_no_clock, aarh.office_time_clock, aarh.no_clock_in, aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time, aarh.no_clock_after_work, aarh.alt_first_time_from, aarh.alt_first_time_to, aarh.alt_extend1_time_flag, aarh.alt_second_time_from, aarh.alt_second_time_to, aarh.alt_extend2_time_flag, aarh.alt_third_time_from, aarh.alt_third_time_to, aarh.alt_extend3_time_flag, aarh.alt_rest_day_flag, aarh.attribute1, aarh.attribute2, aarh.attribute3, aarh.attribute4, aarh.attribute5, aarh.id, aarh.dispose_flag, aarh.result, aarh.dispose_result as dispose_result, aarh.dispose_describes, aarh.dispose_by as dispose_by, aarh.dispose_time as dispose_time, case when isnull(aarh.check_result, '') = '' then aarh.dispose_result else aarh.check_result end as target_result, case when isnull(aarh.check_describes, '') = '' then aarh.dispose_describes else aarh.check_describes end as target_describes, aarh.check_result as check_result, aarh.check_describes as check_describes, aarh.req_code AS req_code, aarh.state AS state, aarh.admin_result AS admin_result, aarh.oa_remark AS oa_remark, aarh.code_status as code_status, aarh.leader_result as leader_result, aarh.commit_flag as commit_flag, aarh.day_clock_time as day_clock_time, pe.work_card AS pe_work_card, pe.NAME AS pe_name,pe.id AS pe_id, fds.id as dept_id, pejs.job_id as job_id, pejs.id as pej_id, pejs.dept_id as pej_dept_id FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh JOIN pm_employee_job pejs ON aarh.employee_id = pejs.employee_id and pejs.enabled_flag = 1 and pejs.job_main_flag = 1 JOIN pm_employee pe ON pejs.employee_id = pe.id JOIN fnd_dept fds ON fds.id = pejs.dept_id and fds.enabled_flag = 1 and fds.deleted_flag = 0

union
and aarh.employee_id = #{criteria.personEmployeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
AND ( aarh.code_status = 'documentor' or aarh.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'person' )
AND ( (isnull(aarh.commit_flag, 0) = 0 and (aarh.code_status = 'documentor' or aarh.code_status = 'leader' or aarh.code_status = 'person')) or (isnull(aarh.commit_flag, 0) = 0 and (aarh.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'leaderRepulseToPerson')) )
and (aarh.code_status = 'person' or aarh.code_status = 'leaderRepulse')
AND (aarh.code_status = 'documentor' or aarh.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' or aarh.code_status = 'person' or aarh.code_status = 'leader' ) and isnull(aarh.commit_flag, 0) = 0

and ( temp.no_scheduling = 1 OR temp.all_day_no_clock = 1 OR temp.office_time_clock = 1 OR temp.no_clock_in = 1 OR temp.abnormal_clock_in_time = 1 OR temp.no_clock_after_work = 1 )
and temp.target_result like #{criteria.targetResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and temp.target_describes like #{criteria.targetDescribes, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej WHERE pej.id = temp.pej_id AND pej.job_id != isnull(( SELECT fd.admin_job_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.id = temp.dept_id ), -1 ))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pm_employee_job pej WHERE pej.id = temp.pej_id AND pej.job_id = isnull(( SELECT fd.admin_job_id FROM fnd_dept fd WHERE fd.id = temp.dept_id ), -1 ))
AND temp.dept_id IN
#{item, jdbcType=BIGINT}
and temp.date between '${criteria.beginDateStr}' AND '${criteria.endDateStr}'
and temp.date between #{criteria.beginDate, jdbcType = DATE} AND #{criteria.endDate, jdbcType = DATE}
and temp.date <= '${criteria.endAndBeforeStr}'
and temp.employee_id = #{criteria.employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}
and temp.id in (
#{item}
)
and temp.pe_name like #{criteria.employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and (temp.pe_name like #{criteria.queryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or temp.pe_work_card like #{criteria.queryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
and temp.no_scheduling = 1
and temp.rest_day_clock = 1
and temp.all_day_no_clock = 1
and temp.office_time_clock = 1
and (temp.no_clock_in = 1 or temp.no_clock_after_work = 1)
and temp.abnormal_clock_in_time = 1
and temp.code_status = 'person' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0
and temp.code_status = 'documentor' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0
and temp.code_status = 'leader' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0
and temp.code_status = 'leader' and temp.commit_flag = 1
and temp.code_status = 'acAdmin' and temp.commit_flag = 1
and ( (temp.code_status = 'leaderRepulse' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0) or (temp.code_status = 'leaderRepulseToPerson' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0) )
and temp.code_status = 'acAdminRepulse' and isnull(temp.commit_flag,0) = 0
and temp.code_status = 'close' and temp.commit_flag = 1
and temp.req_code is not null
and 1 = 1
and temp.req_code is null
and temp.state = 'pass'
and temp.state = 'wait'
and temp.state = 'notpass'
and temp.state != 'pass'
mapper.update:
update aarht set commit_flag = 1, check_result = case when temp.code_status <> 'leader' then temp.dispose_result else temp.check_result end, check_describes = case when temp.code_status <> 'leader' then temp.dispose_describes else temp.check_describes end, attribute1 = case when temp.code_status <> 'leader' then '资料员于复核中提交' else null end, code_status = 'leader' from (
) temp join ac_attendance_record_history aarht on temp.id = aarht.id

update ac_attendance_record_history set update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, dispose_flag = #{disposeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dispose_by = #{disposeBy, jdbcType = BIGINT}, dispose_time = #{disposeTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select * from ac_attendance_record_history aarh where aarh.state = 'wait'
mapper.update: update ac_attendance_record_history set attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = getdate() where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into KQ_CRJSJ_TEMP (kh, time8, date8, mjkzqbh, crjqk) values ('${name}','${time8}','${date8}','${machineName}','${crjqk}')
